title: Lava Chicken Music Disc Not Playing
description: Can't hear the Lava Chicken music disc in game? This resurcepack fix that!
body:
If you **can't** hear the Lava Chicken music disc in game and get this text in your logs: 
![Error message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/702e821ae7cc4f4e46f4eacfdaa8e6d18972791a.png)

This is a resurcepack that adds the sound event for Lava Chicken back into your game again.

**This bug is fixed in Minecraft 1.21.9**
